meaning: n.浸渍者,汲取的人,浸染工,显影液容器,北斗七星
examples: It is the brightest star at the left of this well-composed starry mosaic spanning about 23 degrees across the northern sky asterism dubbed the Little Dipper.
The bright dipper stars above are named Dubhe, Merak, Phecda, Megrez, Alioth, Mizar, and Alkaid.
Part of the larger constellation of Ursa Major, the bright dipper stars above are named Dubhe, Merak, Phecda, and Megrez.
Murad scoops wine from them using a dipper made out of a pumpkin shell.
Mercer Investment Consulting, the Marsh pension-fund adviser, is, like its insurance sibling, a double-dipper.
